schema.name: pm.schedule
schema.description: Schedule for the Pytagoras Fullstack Template. Activities map directly to tasks.json entries. Execution is autonomous (Claude Code headless sessions). Duration is measured in agent sessions, not calendar days.

calendars.name: Agent Execution Calendar
calendars.description: Autonomous agent sessions run on-demand. Duration = number of Claude Code sessions. No fixed working hours.

milestones.name: Backend Complete
milestones.description: All backend phases (1-4) done. 24/48 tasks complete.

milestones.name: Frontend Slices Complete
milestones.description: Reached in the local repo via phase-5 implementation commits on 2026-03-06. All primary UI pages and auth/admin wrappers are in place.

milestones.name: Full Integration Working
milestones.description: Frontend and backend wired. Streaming chat works end-to-end.

milestones.name: Tests and Docs Complete
milestones.description: All tests pass, all documentation written.

milestones.name: Template Published
milestones.description: Template tagged and ready to use as GitHub template repository.

activities.name: Initialize monorepo structure
activities.description: Create frontend/ and backend/ directories with basic config files

criteria.description: frontend/ directory exists with package.json
backend/ directory exists with pyproject.toml
Root .gitignore excludes node_modules, __pycache__, .env
docker-compose.yml placeholder exists at root

activities.name: Setup frontend with Next.js and Bun
activities.description: Initialize Next.js app with TypeScript, Tailwind, and Biome
steps: Run bun create next-app in frontend/
Create package.json scripts for dev, build, lint, test

criteria.description: frontend/package.json contains next, react, react-dom dependencies
frontend/tsconfig.json has strict mode enabled
frontend/tailwind.config.ts exists and is valid
frontend/biome.json exists with linting rules configured
frontend/components.json exists (shadcn config)
npm run dev, build, lint commands work without errors

activities.name: Setup backend with FastAPI and uv
activities.description: Initialize Python backend with FastAPI and modern tooling
steps: Add FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2, Pydantic, Alembic dependencies
Add Ruff, mypy, pytest as dev dependencies
Create app/main.py with basic FastAPI app

criteria.description: backend/pyproject.toml exists with FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, Pydantic, Alembic
backend/pyproject.toml includes ruff, mypy, pytest in dev dependencies
backend/app/ directory structure exists
backend/app/main.py creates FastAPI application instance
backend/app/config.py defines Settings class with Pydantic BaseSettings
uv run uvicorn app.main:app starts server without errors

activities.description: Add .env.example files for both frontend and backend

criteria.description: frontend/.env.example exists with NEXT_PUBLIC_* variables documented
backend/.env.example exists with DATABASE_URL, CLERK_SECRET_KEY, etc.
.gitignore contains .env and .env.local patterns

activities.name: Setup database interfaces and connection
activities.description: Create database abstraction layer with protocols
steps: Create app/core/database/interfaces.py with IDatabase, IUnitOfWork, IRepository protocols
Create app/core/database/models.py with SQLAlchemy base and mixins (UUIDMixin, TimestampMixin)
Define type aliases using Annotated for clean DI (SessionDep, UnitOfWorkDep)

criteria.description: app/core/database/interfaces.py defines IDatabase, IUnitOfWork, IRepository protocols
app/core/database/connection.py implements AsyncDatabase with async session management
app/core/database/models.py defines Base, UUIDMixin, TimestampMixin
app/core/database/unit_of_work.py implements transaction management
Type aliases SessionDep, UnitOfWorkDep are defined and importable

steps: Create initial Alembic migration for users table

criteria.description: User model has clerk_id, role, theme, language fields
IUserRepository protocol defines CRUD operations
UserRepository implements IUserRepository
Alembic migration creates users table with correct columns

activities.description: Implement chat data models

Message model has conversation_id, role, content, created_at fields
IConversationRepository and IMessageRepository protocols defined
Repository implementations handle CRUD operations
Migration creates conversations and messages tables with foreign keys

activities.description: Implement system configuration storage

criteria.description: SystemConfig model has key, value, updated_at fields
ISystemConfigRepository defines get/set config operations
Repository implementation persists and retrieves config
Migration creates system_config table

steps: Add AIModel model to models.py (model_id, display_name, provider, is_enabled, is_default, sort_order)

IAIModelRepository defines list_enabled, get_default operations
Repository implementation supports CRUD operations
Migration creates ai_models table

Create app/dependencies.py with get_session, get_unit_of_work providers
Define Annotated type aliases: SessionDep, UnitOfWorkDep, UserRepositoryDep, etc.
Wire up container lifecycle in main.py (startup/shutdown events)

app/dependencies.py exports dependency providers
Type aliases enable clean function signatures: def endpoint(user_repo: UserRepositoryDep)

activities.name: Create domain exception hierarchy
activities.description: Define custom exceptions for clean error handling across service layer
steps: Create app/core/exceptions.py with base DomainError class
Add ValidationError(DomainError) for business rule violations
Document exception usage patterns in docstrings

criteria.description: DomainError base class exists with message attribute
NotFoundError, ValidationError, AuthorizationError inherit from DomainError
Exception handler in main.py converts exceptions to appropriate HTTP status codes
NotFoundError maps to 404, ValidationError to 400, AuthorizationError to 403

httpx is in pyproject.toml dependencies

activities.name: Connect frontend to backend API
activities.description: Validate and complete end-to-end frontend/backend wiring across landing, dashboard, profile, and admin flows.
steps: Verify backend base URL, auth token flow, and Authorization header injection
Connect landing guest chat to the live backend endpoint
Connect dashboard conversation CRUD and chat flows to backend persistence
Connect profile load/save flows to the backend profile endpoint
Connect admin user, settings, and model pages to backend admin APIs
Fix any discovered CORS, auth, routing, or schema mismatches

criteria.description: API client injects Authorization: Bearer <token> for authenticated requests
Guest chat works against the backend without authentication
Dashboard chat creates, reloads, and deletes persisted conversations
Profile page loads and saves user preferences through the backend
Admin pages load and mutate users, settings, and models through backend APIs

activities.name: Implement streaming chat responses
activities.description: Complete frontend streaming UX on top of the existing backend SSE endpoints.
steps: Consume chat streams with fetch and ReadableStream handling in guest and authenticated chat hooks
Update assistant messages incrementally as stream chunks arrive
Persist authenticated streamed responses after completion
Show visible typing/loading state while streaming is active
Surface stream failures as recoverable user-facing errors

criteria.description: Chat endpoints support text/event-stream responses for streaming
Frontend consumes the stream with fetch and ReadableStream parsing
Assistant messages render incrementally as chunks arrive
A typing/loading indicator is visible while the stream is active
Stream failures surface a user-friendly error without breaking state

activities.name: Add model selection feature
activities.description: Expose model selection in the dashboard UI and persist model choice per conversation.
steps: Load enabled models from GET /api/models into the dashboard store
Expose a model selector in the chat interface
Store the selected model on the conversation record
Send the selected model with chat requests
Default new conversations to the backend default model when none is selected

criteria.description: Dashboard model selector displays enabled models from the API
Selected model is stored on the conversation record
Chat requests include the selected model parameter
New conversations default to the backend default model
Conversation model choice is restored after reload or reopen

activities.name: Create Docker configurations
activities.description: Harden the existing frontend and backend Dockerfiles for local Compose development and Railway production builds.
steps: Refactor frontend/Dockerfile into explicit development and production multi-stage targets with Bun
Refactor backend/Dockerfile into explicit development and production multi-stage targets with uv
Ensure Railway build-time env values can reach the frontend production build
Add or expand .dockerignore files for both services

criteria.description: frontend/Dockerfile supports Bun-based development and production builds
criteria.result: Verified via docker compose build frontend and standalone docker build --target production for frontend.

criteria.description: backend/Dockerfile supports uv-based development and production builds
criteria.result: Verified via docker compose build backend,migrate and standalone docker build --target production for backend.

criteria.description: Docker images use multi-stage builds for optimization
criteria.result: Both frontend and backend Dockerfiles now define explicit development and production stages and build successfully.

criteria.description: .dockerignore excludes node_modules, __pycache__, .git
criteria.result: frontend/.dockerignore was expanded and backend/.dockerignore was added with the required exclusions.

execution.lastEvent: Dockerfiles refactored into development/production multi-stage targets; docker compose build and standalone production-target builds passed on 2026-03-08.

activities.name: Create docker-compose.yml

steps: Review the existing docker-compose.yml against the current frontend, backend, migrate, and db services
Confirm environment variables are loaded from the expected .env files
Validate health checks and service dependency ordering
Verify services can communicate across the internal compose network
Confirm docker compose up starts the full local stack from the documented setup flow

criteria.description: docker-compose.yml defines db, migrate, frontend, and backend services
criteria.result: Verified: docker-compose.yml defines db, migrate, backend, and frontend services.

criteria.description: Environment variables are loaded from .env files
criteria.result: Verified: frontend/.env.local and backend/.env are loaded via env_file, with Compose overrides for local-safe host-facing values.

criteria.description: Health checks verify service availability
criteria.result: Verified: compose health checks passed; docker compose ps showed db, backend, and frontend healthy after recreation.

criteria.description: Services can communicate via internal network
criteria.result: Verified: db -> migrate -> backend -> frontend startup ordering completed successfully across the compose network.

criteria.description: docker-compose up starts both services
criteria.result: Verified: docker compose up -d --build recreated the stack successfully and both health endpoints returned 200.

execution.lastEvent: docker-compose.yml finalized for local-only development and validated with docker compose up -d --build on 2026-03-08.

activities.name: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow
activities.description: Automated quality checks for branch promotion and optional Railway Wait for CI gating.
steps: Add frontend lint, typecheck, build jobs
Add backend ruff, mypy, pytest jobs
Run on pushes and pull requests targeting main

criteria.description: .github/workflows/ci.yml exists and is valid YAML
Frontend job runs: bun lint, bun typecheck, bun build
criteria.result: Verified: frontend CI job runs bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint, bun run typecheck, and bun run build.

criteria.description: Backend job runs: ruff check, mypy, pytest
criteria.result: Verified: backend CI job runs uv sync --frozen --extra dev, uv run ruff check ., uv run mypy ., and uv run pytest.

criteria.description: Workflow triggers on push and pull_request to main
criteria.result: Verified: workflow triggers on push and pull_request to main.

criteria.description: Workflow exposes stable check names that can be used as required checks for branch protection and Railway Wait for CI
criteria.result: Verified: workflow exposes stable Frontend and Backend job names that can be used by branch protection and Railway Wait for CI.

execution.lastEvent: GitHub Actions CI workflow added on 2026-03-08 for frontend lint/typecheck/build and backend ruff/mypy/pytest.

activities.name: Create Railway deployment configs
activities.description: Configure Railway for GitHub-driven staging and production deployments with CLI-backed environment sync automation.
steps: Create frontend/railway.toml with Dockerfile-based build config, deploy command, health check path, and watch patterns
Create backend/railway.toml with Dockerfile-based build config, deploy command, health check path, and watch patterns
Add a standalone uv script that reads backend/.env and frontend/.env.local, fetches pooled Neon URLs, and syncs Railway variables for production and staging
Use Railway reference variables so deployed backend/frontend URLs are derived from service public domains instead of localhost values
Document the GitHub branch workflow, required CLIs, Railway service setup, and env sync workflow

criteria.description: frontend/railway.toml specifies Dockerfile-based build config, deploy command, health check path, and watch patterns
criteria.result: Verified: frontend/railway.toml now specifies Dockerfile build config, deploy command, health check path, and watch patterns.

criteria.description: backend/railway.toml specifies Dockerfile-based build config, deploy command, health check path, and watch patterns
criteria.result: Verified: backend/railway.toml now specifies Dockerfile build config, deploy command, health check path, and watch patterns.

criteria.description: Standalone uv environment sync script provisions frontend and backend Railway variables for production and staging using local env files and Neon CLI
criteria.result: Verified: uv run scripts/sync_railway_env.py --project pytagoras-template --dry-run --yes completed successfully and showed production/staging variable sync targets.

criteria.description: Railway variable automation replaces localhost-only service URLs with Railway reference variables so deployed services resolve each other correctly
criteria.result: Verified: env sync automation derives NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, FRONTEND_URL, and OPENROUTER_SITE_URL from Railway reference variables instead of localhost values.

criteria.description: README and PRD document the GitHub branch deployment workflow (dev -> staging -> main), required CLIs, and Railway service setup steps
criteria.result: Verified: README.md, docs/railway.md, and prd.md document the GitHub branch deployment workflow, required CLIs, and Railway service setup.

criteria.description: Railway production and staging deployments are configured to build from the GitHub monorepo rather than relying on railway up or docker-compose.yml
criteria.result: Pending external validation: the live Railway project still needs distinct frontend/backend services and staging/production environment linkage configured against the GitHub monorepo.

execution.lastEvent: Railway config files, docs, and env sync automation were implemented on 2026-03-08; live Railway service wiring remains to be completed in the external project.
